subcodes.first_line: The water of life floweth forth and courseth from the Pen that revealeth verses, and through its streaming the seekers of the right hand of the All-Merciful attain unto this Word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آب حیات از قلم منزل آیات جاری و ساریست و از جریان آن قاصدان یمن رحمن اینکلمه
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @power of prayer, @rejection, opposition and persecution
